title: Evaluate eligible transactions
preconditions: The public LEDGER contract is compatible; an active normalization and rule-set version exists; the owner can obtain a snapshot-bound ordered eligible transaction set and active category catalogue.
postconditions: LEDGER is unchanged; every eligible transaction is accounted for in stable order; outcomes and evidence are bound to the evaluated snapshot and versions.
main_flow: CLASSIFY opens an evaluation run; queries the complete eligible set through LEDGER; validates transaction, category, normalization, and rule-set versions; evaluates each transaction deterministically; emits exactly one suggestion with rule evidence, no-suggestion, or conflict outcome per transaction; and returns coverage and conflict totals without mutation.
alt_flows: Reject an incompatible or unavailable LEDGER contract before evaluation.
Abort without partial outcomes when the snapshot cannot remain consistent.
Return an explicit bounded-limit failure without mutation when the transaction or rule limit is exceeded.
Mark a transaction outcome stale rather than guessing when its lifecycle or category state changes.
metadata: {"depth_tier":2,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner explicitly requests classification after canonical transactions exist in LEDGER.","status":"draft"}
